text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about the delay!
What can I get you?

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: Fssh… fsssh…… slrrrrp… chew… Mmmm! Slrr-rrrp… mglk!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Heh, you'll have what they're having, huh? Sure thing. One sweet shōyu ramen!!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Coming right up! Hah, hup, aaand plop!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you look ready to inhale the whole
bowl the moment you get it! Just gimme
a min, alright?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh I-I'm sorryyyy…! Ummmmm…
Alright! The noodles are in…!!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Great work, Light O! Don't worry too much
about the presentation. I'll fix it up if needed, so keep at it!

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text:
Ramen — the beloved comfort food
of the nation.

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text:
An exquisite taste that fills both bellies
and hearts with joy. …But is that really
all there is to it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And enjoy our heartfelt
gratitude in every bite!

Welcome to Tracen Ramen!
～A Thank-You to Fans～
